column7: Stimulates early vigor and canopy cover; improves competitive ability against weeds.
Accelerates early growth for hybrid vigor; potassium improves stalk strength from seedling stage.
Boosts culm strength through improved N-S balance; reduces lodging risk at high yield levels.
Enhances disease resistance; potassium activates defense enzymes against blast and sheath blight.
Brassinosteroid improves stress signaling; apply at reproductive stage to reduce sterility under fluctuating temperatures.
Beneficial fungi improve root surface area; nano-NPK ensures rapid replenishment of nutrients during peak demand.
Root exudate mix stimulates phosphate-solubilizing bacteria; improves P uptake without additional P fertilizer input.
Biological N from Azolla supplements inorganic fertilizer; improves N use efficiency and reduces environmental N losses.
Water-soluble foliar application improves disease resistance; potassium component strengthens cell walls against pathogen entry.
